title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1025 - Director may adopt rules
text:
376.1025.  Director may adopt rules. — The director may adopt regulations which are necessary to implement the provisions of sections 376.1000 to 376.1045 and to ensure the safe and proper operation of multiple employer self-insured health plans in this state.  No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of this section shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1993 H.B. 709 § 32, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
